content: Self-Refine's iterative, unsupervised self-feedback loop for output refinement can be grounded in multiple inconsistent LLM self-reflection perspectives to create a hybrid framework that catches far more flaws than either approach alone. This hybrid system retains Self-Refine's core advantage of needing no extra training or labeled data while leveraging self-reflection mechanisms' strength of challenging blind spots a single self-feedback perspective would miss.
